## 🔍 Environment Information

**Please fill in all applicable details:**

- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]

- **crewAI version:** [e.g., 1.14.2]
- **Idea-Enhancer version:** [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **CPU/GPU:** [e.g., Intel i7, NVIDIA RTX 3080]
- **RAM:** [e.g., 16GB]

# Run these and paste output
python --version
pip list | grep -E "crewai|crewai-tools"
